message:
🐛 fix: force software audio decoding for eac3/ac3 streams (#8)

- Use ad=lavc:* to bypass AudioToolbox hardware decoders (eac3_at, ac3_at)
  which silently fail on devices without surround passthrough
- Explicit ao=coreaudio output
- Re-apply volume/mute after media open
- Await all setProperty calls

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
